info.title: Cli
info.description: CLI for Todosaurus — a tool to process TODO issues in a repository.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Todosaurus — a tool to process TODO issues in a repository.

options.name: --config
options.description: Path to configuration file (default: todosaurus.toml in working directory)

options.name: --strict
options.description: Treat warnings as errors (non-zero exit code) [default: False]

commands.name: files
commands.description: List text files eligible for TODO checking

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Scan for unresolved TODO items and report them as GitHub Actions annotations

options.name: --config
options.description: Path to configuration file (default: todosaurus.toml in working directory)

options.name: --strict
options.description: Treat warnings as errors (non-zero exit code) [default: False]
